title: EP - Valid login with correct email and password
precondition: User account exists with email 'user@example.com' and password 'CorrectPass1'
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter email 'user@example.com'
Enter password 'CorrectPass1'
Click 'Login' button
expected_result: User is logged in and redirected to home page

title: DT - R1: Registered user with valid credentials
precondition: User is registered with email 'user@example.com' and password 'CorrectPass1'
test_steps:
Navigate to login page
Enter email 'user@example.com'
Enter password 'CorrectPass1'
Click 'Login' button

title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: User is successfully logged into the system.
coverage_items: LoggedOut--login[registered user with valid credentials]/log user in-->LoggedIn
